title: COMMUNITY MEDIATION SERVICES - 211info
text: COMMUNITY MEDIATION SERVICES FOR POLK COUNTY COMMUNITY MEDIATION SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Trained mediators assist in finding solutions to conflicts. Mediators have experience with interpersonal disputes, family mediation (e.g., parent/teen, runaways), parenting plan adjustments, neighborhood disputes (e.g., barking dogs, property line/easement disputes), landlord/tenant disputes, institutional/business mediation, and victim/offender mediation. Also holds workshops, public lectures, and discussions on mediation and coaches individuals in conflicted situations. Meetings may be held in the client's community to ease time or transportation limitations. Does not mediate domestic violence cases. 320 SE Fir Villa Road Dallas, OR 97338 Eligibility: Must be a resident of or employed in Polk County Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm. Special arrangements outside these hours may be possible. Email (503) 623-3111 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 623-3111 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or email for more information FEES: None for most community mediation Parenting plan mediation: $25 set-up fee from each party. The first individual interview with each party and the first joint mediation session are free. Subsequent sessions are $50 per hour per participant with a sliding scale. No one is denied services due to the inability to pay. Institutional or business mediations: $100 per hour, divided between the parties DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish by arrangement AREA SERVED: Polk County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: In Dallas: Turn south onto Fir Villa Road from either eastbound or westbound Ellendale Avenue. Church is on the East side of the road. Look for the "VORP" sign on the northwest side of the building and ring the doorbell. From Miller Avenue/Orrs Corner Road: Turn north onto Fir Villa Road. Church is on the right. Look for the "VORP" sign on the northwest side of the building and ring the doorbell. Services: Comprehensive Family Law Services Conflict Resolution Training Landlord/Tenant Dispute Resolution Mediation Organizational Conflict Resolution Services Victim/Offender Mediation Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. COMMUNITY MEDIATION SERVICES FOR POLK COUNTY
